title: InfoScene row DSL + table alignment
description: Implement v1 multi-row InfoLayout DSL with table alignment, host-raster rendering, demo/CLI integration, tests/docs, and manual acceptance checklist.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started implementation: adding InfoLayout DSL module, updating InfoScene rendering, then demo/CLI/tests/docs integration.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented DSL/module integration: added pypixoo.info_dsl, migrated InfoScene to layout-based rendering, integrated demo+CLI --info-layout-json, and added tests/docs. Automated validation passed (py_compile, 62 pytest tests across targeted suites, sphinx-build). Keeping acceptance/docs task open for live visual confirmation on device.
